response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate with over a decade of experience directly aligned with the core stack, including TypeScript, Node.js, and React, alongside solid cloud and containerization expertise. His recent work involving AI-agent infrastructure and a deep background in testing and software craftsmanship make him a highly compelling fit for this senior full-stack role, easily outweighing the lack of explicit Nest.js experience.
strengths: Extensive experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and infrastructure (AWS, Docker, K8s)
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong engineering fundamentals with a proven track record in TDD, CI/CD, and system architecture
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, though highly experienced in equivalent Node/testing tools
Significant historical focus on DLang, which is outside the required tech stack
Background leans more towards product and open-source platforms rather than internal enterprise automation tooling
